summary: Completed comprehensive testing of upgraded DataForge with custom data cleaning rules, sticky visualization panel, and Gemini AI integration. All required features working perfectly including custom field formatting, AI-powered cleaning, and improved user experience.
passed_tests: Backend health endpoint (200 OK)
File upload with CSV containing name, date, order, price, product columns
Custom cleaning rule: date field shows '00-00-0000' for missing dates
Custom cleaning rule: name field shows proper case (jOHN → John, alice → Alice)
Custom cleaning rule: order field shows 'ORD X' format (ORD 1, ORD 2, etc.) or 0 for missing
Custom cleaning rule: price field shows 0 for missing values, numeric for valid values
Custom cleaning rule: product field shows 'Unknown' for missing values
Quality score updates from 76% to 100% after cleaning
Sticky visualization panel stays in position when scrolling main content
AI message appears after cleaning action with detailed Gemini analysis
Download Clean Data button accessible and functional
Landing page loads correctly with all sections
Upload page functionality with drag-and-drop interface
Dashboard layout with three-column grid (stats, main content, visualizations)
Data table displays cleaned data with proper formatting
Cleaning controls with AI Prediction (MICE) strategy selection
Loading overlay appears during processing
Success messages display with AI analysis details
Charts and visualizations in right sticky panel
All backend API endpoints (upload, action, download, cleanup) working
Gemini AI integration providing intelligent cleaning recommendations

success_percentage.backend: 100% (10/10 API tests passing including custom rules verification)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (All UI components, custom rules, sticky panel, and AI integration working)
